title: Agent input schemas are parsed but never validated at dispatch time
body: AgentSpec.inputSchema is populated by agent-spec.ts:126 but step-agent.ts never validates the step's resolved input against it. The synthesizer agent requires [structure, quality, patterns] but resumable-analysis.workflow.yaml passes only structure and quality — this silently succeeds. Input schemas are decorative, creating false confidence in typed composition. Either add validation in executeAgentStep() before dispatch, or remove inputSchema from the type to stop pretending.
resolved_by: v0.11.0 commit 92e5427 — inputSchema validation in executeAgentStep(), task-001/ver-001. Criterion 6 (audit all callers) deferred to task-002.
